scripts.preinstall: node -e "const execPath = process.env.npm_execpath || ''; if (!/pnpm/.test(execPath)) { console.error('This repository requires pnpm. Please run `pnpm install`.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.test:widget-tree: pnpm exec vitest run packages/json-widget/src/jdw-node.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/document.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/apply-widget-document-patch.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/widget-asset-file.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/validate-json-widget-data.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/validate-widget-asset.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/widget-placement-asset.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/widget-asset-package.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/widget-normalize.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/layout/layout-widget.test.ts packages/json-widget/src/widget-patch-materialize.test.ts packages/react/src/jdw packages/react/src/widget-tree packages/react/src/widget-asset packages/react/src/widget-studio
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/base typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/platform typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/workbench-extension-sdk typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/workbench-config typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/workbench-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/workbench-react typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/jdw typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/jdw-editor typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/services typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/workspace typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/adapters typecheck && pnpm --filter @workbench-kit/react typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm format:check && pnpm build:storybook && pnpm check:extension-manifests && node ./scripts/check-workbench-dependency-graph.mjs && node ./scripts/check-launch-boundary.mjs
